name: memory
description: Recall details from previous OpalZero missions. Use this tool when the user asks about a past task, references a previous result, or says things like 'last time', 'remember when', 'what did we find about', or 'the result of'. Pass a 'query' with key words from the user's request, or a 'mission_id' if the exact ID is known.

mission_id.description: Exact mission ID to retrieve (e.g. 'mission_1234_plan_trip_rome'). Use this when you know the precise ID.

query.description: Free-text search query. The tool will find the past mission whose intent best matches these keywords.
